name: directions
description: Get driving directions and real-time traffic conditions using Google Maps

intents.name: driving_directions
intents.description: Get driving directions, travel time with live traffic, distance, and route summary between two locations
examples: how do I get to the airport?
how far is it to the mall?
what's the best route to the office?
how long to get to work?

args.origin: Starting location (address or place name). If unspecified: before 9am use Owner's home address, after 9am use Owner's office address — both from PERSONAL.yaml.
args.destination: Destination location (address or place name). If unspecified: before 9am use Owner's office address, after 9am use Owner's home address — both from PERSONAL.yaml.
args.waypoint: Optional via waypoint (forces route through this point).
